productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Peep Toe Denim Blue Casual shoes
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these simple and feminine peep toe shoes  from carlton london. The lace bow on the toe region and denim finish makes this a comfortable and stylish everyday wear.Heel: 2"Upper Leather upper with a denim finish on the outerPeep toe style with a lace bow on the toe box regionOutsole PU outsole with lugs on the forefoot and a wooden heelSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
